Summary Heap-based buffer overflow Adobe Flash Player before 13.0.0.296 14.x through 18.x before 18.0.0.194 Windows before 11.2.202.468 Linux allows remote attackers execute arbitrary code unspecified vectors, exploited wild June 2015.
description This module exploits buffer overflow Adobe Flash Player when handling nellymoser encoded audio inside video, exploited wild June 2015. This module been tested successfully Windows (32-bit), IE11 Adobe Flash 18.0.0.160, Windows (32-bit), Firefox 38.0.5 Adobe Flash 18.0.0.160, Windows 8.1, Firefox 38.0.5 Adobe Flash 18.0.0.160, Linux Mint "Rebecca" bits), Firefox 33.0 Adobe Flash 11.2.202.466, Ubuntu 14.04.2 LTS, Firefox 35.01, Adobe Flash 11.2.202.466. Note that this exploit effective against both CVE-2015-3113 earlier CVE-2015-3043, since CVE-2015-3113 effectively regression same root cause CVE-2015-3043.
description version Adobe Flash Player installed remote Windows host equal prior version 18.0.0.161. therefore, affected remote code execution vulnerability improper validation unspecified user-supplied input. remote attacker exploit this, specially crafted Flash content, cause heap-based buffer overflow, resulting execution arbitrary code.
description Adobe Flash Player updated 11.2.202.468, fixing security issue, where attackers could trigger heap overflow could execute code. Note that Tenable Network Security extracted preceding description block directly from SUSE security advisory. Tenable attempted automatically clean format much possible without introducing additional issues.
description version Adobe Flash Player installed remote host equal prior version 18.0.0.161. therefore, affected remote code execution vulnerability improper validation unspecified user-supplied input. remote attacker exploit this, specially crafted Flash content, cause heap-based buffer overflow, resulting execution arbitrary code.
description Adobe Flash Player updated 11.2.202.468, fixing security issue, where attackers could have triggered heap overflow could have executed code. 4.html Note that Tenable Network Security extracted preceding description block directly from SUSE security advisory. Tenable attempted automatically clean format much possible without introducing additional issues.
description Adobe reports Adobe released security updates Adobe Flash Player Windows, Macintosh Linux. These updates address critical vulnerability (CVE-2015-3113) that could potentially allow attacker take control affected system. Adobe aware reports that CVE-2015-3113 being actively exploited wild limited, targeted attacks. Systems running Internet Explorer Windows below, well Firefox Windows known targets.
description updated Adobe Flash Player package that fixes security issue available Enterprise Linux Supplementary. Product Security rated this update having Critical security impact. Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives detailed severity rating, available from link References section. flash-plugin package contains Mozilla Firefox compatible Adobe Flash Player browser plug-in. flaw found flash-plugin displayed certain content. attacker could this flaw create specially crafted file that would cause flash-plugin crash potentially, execute arbitrary code when victim loaded page containing malicious content. (CVE-2015-3113) users Adobe Flash Player should install this updated package, which upgrades Flash Player version 11.2.202.468.
description remote Windows host missing KB3074219. therefore, affected remote code execution vulnerability improper validation unspecified user-supplied input. remote attacker exploit this, specially crafted Flash content, cause heap-based buffer overflow, resulting execution arbitrary code.
description remote host affected vulnerability described GLSA-201507-13 (Adobe Flash Player: Multiple vulnerabilities) Multiple vulnerabilities have been discovered Adobe Flash Player. Please review identifiers referenced below details. Impact remote attacker could possibly execute arbitrary code with privileges process, cause Denial Service condition, obtain sensitive information, bypass security restrictions. Workaround There known workaround this time.

original text:
3.8.2 NEW: Improved compatibility with UltraVNC SecureVNC plug-in.
3.8.1 NEW: ability align remote screen within ViewerX ActiveX control boundaries. values that have been added ScreenStretchMode enum.
NEW: NTLM login window pre-initialized with current user name domain credentials have been API.
FIX: ViewerX makes hosting application window active when connection uppon esteblishing connection.
3.7.5 FIX: 64-bit build crash while perfoming UltraVNC NTLM authentication.
3.7.4 FIX: Cancel button visible password prompt screen.
3.7.0 NEW: Implemented support libjpeg-turbo. This allows accelerate decompression processing jpeg images.
3.6.2 FIX: Stability security fixes.
3.6.1 NEW: Support unicode clipboard transfers when connected UltraVNC server.
3.5.9 FIX: rare occasions ViewerX crashes when remote server closes connection.
3.5.8 FIX: Stability security fixes.
3.5.7 FIX: Security vulnerability heartbeat read overrun (CVE-2014-0160).
3.5.5 FIX: Windows compatibility fixes.
3.5.4 NEW: Improved support handling so-called "dead" keys, example accent Spanish keyboard.
3.5.3 NEW: Disconnect() method called while asynchronous connection (ConnectAsync) still being established, would return immediately. Previously Disconnect() method would hang until connection been established.
FIX: Fixed memory leak.
3.5.2 NEW: Changed ViewerX renders screen updates when property non-zero value.
FIX: Calling SetDormant(bool) method result application crash.
3.5.1 NEW: Added support SecureVNC v2.3 plugin.
FIX: Upon establishing connection scrollbars visible.
3.4.3 NEW: When connected UltraVNC server running Vista Windows7, Auto Reconnect feature been fine tuned better handle cases when UltraVNC server breaks connection upon user logoff.
FIX: Application hang when Auto Reconnect window appears.
3.4.1 NEW: ConnectingText, DisconnectedText, ListeningText properties support Unicode strings.
3.3.8 FIX: "Empty desktop size" error when accepting listening connection from establishing connection TightVNC server without password set.
FIX: ConnectionAccepted event gets sent after Disconnected event.
3.3.7 NEW: Added support sending Ctrl+Alt+Del command remote computer Ctrl+Alt+End keyboard shortcut. properties more information.
3.3.6 FIX: Minor fixes.
3.3.5.0 NEW: Added property. When screen stretching mode enabled, this property allows switch between GDI+ based screen scaling engine. Starting with this build, default, ViewerX uses GDI+ (Low Quality) scaling mode.
3.3.4.0 FIX: takes long establish connection computer that IPv4 IPv6 addresses assigned.
3.3.1.0 NEW: ConnextXXX functions have been updated support Internet Protocol version (IPv6).
3.2.3.0 NEW: Support legacy servers (such RealVNC 3.3.7) that v3.3 protocol.
3.2.2.0 NEW: API: Event OnMouseMove allows tracking mouse cursor movements.
3.2.1.0 NEW: Support UltraVNC Server 1.0.9.5 with protocol v3.8. This enables file-transfer with 1.0.9.5 servers fixes "Unsupported security type" message that would receive tried connect UltraVNC 1.0.9.5 with NTLM authentication.
3.1.6.0 sample project been modified ViewerX registration-free component.
3.1.4.0 CHANGED: made compatible work with server. previous builds working with UltraVNC server only.
3.1.3.0 FIX: When using non-English keyboard layout some characters appear question marks.
3.1.2.0 NEW: SecureVNC v2.2.4.0 plug-in support. reference interface more details.
3.0.6.1 FIX: Mouse clicks handled incorrectly Chinese, Japanese Korean language default input method.
3.0.6.0 NEW: Brand rendering engine implementation. engine uses less renders screen updates much faster comparing previous versions.
NEW: Ability reconnect automatically server event network disconnection. support this feature property OnAutoReconnecting event have been added.
NEW: Added support Ultra, ZYWRLE, Cache encodings.
NEW: ColorDepth property allows specify number colors used. Currently full colors, colors, colors, colors palettes supported. This property deprecates RestrictPixel property.
NEW: events have been added that allow logging messages sent/received UltraVNC chat.
NEW: method been implemented. previous builds this method returning black&white image.
NEW: event Fired when ViewerX receives "disable remote input" state from server.
NEW: property been added. sets outer background color. This background color used paint background when ViewerX size larger than remote screen.
FIX: Fixed several stability issues.
FIX: Screen longer updated after sending receiving files UltraVNC file transfer.
FIX: application creates multiple ViewerX instances that Tight encoding JPEG compression cause random crashes.
FIX: Screen artifacts form horizontal lines appear when ZlibHex encodings used.
FIX: File Transfer window appears instead chat window when chat initiated from server side.
2.9.7.0 NEW: ViewerX 64-bit version available. installer installs 32-bit 64-bit ViewerX binaries.
FIX: Fails establish connection HTTP proxy.
2.9.6.3 FIX: multi-monitor configuration, "Enter Login Credentials" window always displayed primary monitor.
FIX: CursorTrackingMode VCT_NO_CURSOR(0) mouse cursor disappear when hovering over scrollbars.
2.9.6.1 FIX: Moving mouse cursor with "screen stretching" mode enabled leave trailing marks screen.
2.9.6.0 NEW: sends down notifications remote server.
2.9.5.5 NEW: Support "per-user" registration.
FIX: Cannot open more than ViewerX instance with encryption enabled.
2.9.5.4 NEW: Enchanced support UltraVNC 1.0.5.3 file transfers.
API: Allows switching between displays. UltraVNC server specific feature.
API: Sets form SAFEARRAY bytes.
API: Sets form string. Each byte must represented hexadecimal characters. byte value represented single character must padded with zero value. example,
API: Specifies which storage ViewerX must read data. passed ViewerX path external file, binary SAFEARRAY, form string.
2.9.5.1 FIX: ViewerX fails repaint itself properly when screen stretching mode turned
2.9.5.0 NEW: SOCKS5 (username/password) proxy support.
NEW: Improved error diagnostic case ViewerX unable establish connection.
2.8.7.0 FIX: Scrollbars aren't visible after establishing connection server with screen resolution larger than ViewerX window size.
FIX: Destroying ViewerX while file transfer window visible result crash.
FIX: Cannot move ViewerX Visual Basic designer.
2.8.1.0 NEW: Ability select "single window" (UltraVNC server only).
NEW: Enable/Disable remote input (UltraVNC server only).
2.7.6.0 NEW: Support UltraVNC MSRC4 plug-in v1.2.2.
2.7.5.0 FIX: Attempt establish connection SOCKS5 proxy server crashes ViewerX.
2.7.4.0 NEW: Support UltraVNC 1.0.2 NTLM (MSLogon authentication.
2.6.10.0 Implemented workaround Delphi forms bug: ViewerX doesn't send keyboard events when hosted inside Delphi application.
FIX: TightVNC UltraVNC file transfers broken.
2.6.8.0 NEW: UltraVNC plug-in support.
NEW: UltraVNC Single-Click server support.
2.5.85.1 FIX: Fixes UltraVNC file transfer.
FIX: uses default port value instead custom one.
2.5.72.0 NEW: Better handling remote screen resolution changes. ServerDimension event fired every screen resolution change.
FIX: Background painting problem errors ViewerX control window size bigger than remote screen size.
2.5.71.1 FIX: Visual Basic sample project fails instantiate ActiveX control.
FIX: Values ListeningText, DisconnectedText, ConnectingText properties invalid when loading control from persistent storage.
2.5.71.0 NEW: Support UltraVNC chat
NEW: Help file updated with IScVxCapabilities interface description.
2.5.69.0 FIX: Artifacts when control Stretching mode.
2.5.65.1 FIX: ViewerX might freeze server goes down.
CHANGED: Rebuild with renewed software signing certificate.
2.3.41.5 CHANGES: Minor changes control resizing handling.
2.3.40.3 FIX: some installations, ViewerX repositions itself upper left corner inside container window.
FIX: When running inside Browser, ViewerX loses input focus after browser window been restored from minimized state.
2.3.40.1 NEW: Help file updated with information about deploying ViewerX server.
NEW: license file been included installation package.
2.3.40.0 NEW: Listening viewer been implemented. ViewerX control listen incoming server connections.
2.3.38.0 FIX: High usage when working "stretched mode".
